title: Feedback on a risk filter for trading bots
author: Unki11Don
selftext:
Hi ai-traders,  
  
I’m building a small market-context service that helps trading bots avoid the worst market conditions (vol spikes, ugly chop, extreme fear, etc).  
  
It’s working nicely in my tests, but I’ve no idea if it can survive more than \~2 users, so I’m looking for some volunteers to poke it, try it, and tell me what sucks/breaks.  
  
Site and details here if you'd like to have a look:  
[https://remora-ai.com/](https://remora-ai.com/)  
  
Any constructive feedback would be appreciated!  
  
Thanks
